security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: Animation and feature platform development Studio
bundle.longDescription: A project-aware desktop development environment for the repository animation language, runtime and feature platform.
